auth.label: Credential
auth.description: Enter identifier:secret so the runtime can exchange it for a Docker Hub bearer token. Use your Docker username with a password or personal access token, or an organization name with an organization access token.

actions.name: add_org_member
actions.description: Invite a Docker ID or email address to join a Docker Hub organization.

invitee.description: The Docker ID or email address to invite.

teamName.description: The optional team to attach to the invite.

role.description: The optional organization role to assign to the invite.

dryRun.description: Whether to validate the invite without creating it.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The invited Docker ID or email address.
The invite creation result status.
The invite identifier, when available.
The Docker Hub username that created the invite, when available.
The invited Docker ID or email address.
The organization that owns the invite.
The team attached to the invite, when available.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the invite was created, when available.
A Docker Hub organization invite.

items.description: A single Docker Hub bulk invite result.

invitees.description: The invite results returned by the bulk invite endpoint.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for inviting a member to a Docker Hub organization.

actions.name: create_repository
actions.description: Create a Docker Hub repository inside a namespace.

namespace.description: The namespace where the repository should be created.

registry.description: The registry where the repository should be hosted.

isPrivate.description: Whether the repository should be created as private.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

namespace.description: The namespace that owns the repository.

anyOf.description: The repository type, such as image or plugin.
The short repository description, when available.

starCount.description: The number of stars on the repository.

pullCount.description: The total number of pulls for the repository.

anyOf.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the repository was last updated.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the repository was last modified.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the repository was created.
The current user's affiliation with the repository, when available.

mediaTypes.description: The media types supported by the repository.

contentTypes.description: The content types supported by the repository.

categories.description: The categories assigned to the repository.

anyOf.description: The repository storage size in bytes, when available.
The repository owner username, when available.
The Docker Hub user associated with the repository, when available.
The number of collaborators on the repository, when available.
The full repository description, when available.
Whether the current user has starred the repository, when available.
The repository permissions visible to the current credential.

enabled.description: Whether immutable tags are enabled for the repository.

rules.description: The immutable tag rules configured for the repository.

anyOf.description: The immutable tag configuration for the repository.
The repository source metadata, when available.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for creating a Docker Hub repository.

actions.name: delete_team
actions.description: Delete a Docker Hub team within an organization.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

deleted.description: Whether the team deletion request completed.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_image
actions.description: Find a Docker Hub image variant by digest by scanning the repository's published tags.

namespace.description: The namespace that owns the repository.

digest.description: The image manifest digest to look up.

pageSize.description: The number of results to return per page.

maxPages.description: The maximum number of tag pages to scan.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The numeric tag identifier, when available.
The user ID that originally created the tag.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the tag was last updated.
The user ID that last updated the tag.
The Docker Hub username that last updated the tag.
The numeric repository identifier.
The compressed tag size in bytes.
The current Docker Hub tag status.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the tag was last pulled.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the tag was last pushed.
The CPU architecture for the image variant, when available.
The CPU feature set reported for the image variant, when available.
The CPU variant reported for the image variant, when available.
The image manifest digest, when available.
The image layer digest, when available.
The image layer size in bytes, when available.
The Dockerfile instruction associated with the layer, when available.

layers.description: The image layers included in the image variant.

anyOf.description: The operating system for the image variant, when available.
The operating system features reported for the image variant, when available.
The operating system version for the image variant, when available.
The image size in bytes, when available.
The image status returned by Docker Hub, when available.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the image variant was last pulled.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the image variant was last pushed.

images.description: The image variants currently published for the tag.

anyOf.description: The CPU architecture for the image variant, when available.
The CPU feature set reported for the image variant, when available.
The CPU variant reported for the image variant, when available.
The image manifest digest, when available.
The image layer digest, when available.
The image layer size in bytes, when available.
The Dockerfile instruction associated with the layer, when available.

layers.description: The image layers included in the image variant.

anyOf.description: The operating system for the image variant, when available.
The operating system features reported for the image variant, when available.
The operating system version for the image variant, when available.
The image size in bytes, when available.
The image status returned by Docker Hub, when available.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the image variant was last pulled.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the image variant was last pushed.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for searching a Docker Hub image by digest.

anyOf.description: The repository type, such as image or plugin.
The short repository description, when available.

starCount.description: The number of stars on the repository.

pullCount.description: The total number of pulls for the repository.

anyOf.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the repository was last updated.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the repository was last modified.

actions.name: get_team
actions.description: Get a Docker Hub team within an organization.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The numeric team identifier, when available.
The stable UUID of the team, when available.
The team name.
The team description, when available.
The number of members in the team.

actions.name: list_org_access_tokens
actions.description: List Docker Hub organization access tokens for an organization.

pageSize.description: The number of results to return per page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

total.description: The total number of organization access tokens.

anyOf.description: The URL for the next page, or null when unavailable.
The URL for the previous page, or null when unavailable.
The organization access token identifier.
The organization access token label.
The username that created the token, when available.
Whether the organization access token is active.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the token was created.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the token expires, when available.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the token was last used, when available.
The organization access token resource type.
The resource path granted to the token.

scopes.description: The scopes granted for the resource.

items.description: A Docker Hub organization access token resource grant.

resources.description: The resource grants attached to the token.

items.description: A Docker Hub organization access token.

results.description: The organization access tokens in the current page.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Docker Hub organization access token list.

actions.name: list_org_members
actions.description: List Docker Hub organization members with optional filtering and pagination.

pageSize.description: The number of results to return per page.

invites.description: Whether to include invites in the response when supported.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

count.description: The total number of matching items.

anyOf.description: The URL for the next page, or null when unavailable.
The URL for the previous page, or null when unavailable.
The member identifier, when available.
The Docker Hub username of the member.
The full name of the member, when available.
The email address of the member, when available.
The Docker Hub member type, when available.
The organization role assigned to the member.

groups.description: The teams that include the member.

anyOf.description: Whether the member is marked as a guest in the organization.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the member joined the organization.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the member last logged in, when visible.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the member was last seen, when visible.
The last Docker Desktop version seen for the member, when visible.

results.description: The items in the current page.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Docker Hub organization member list.

count.description: The total number of matching items.

namespace.description: The namespace that owns the repository.

anyOf.description: The repository type, such as image or plugin.
The short repository description, when available.

starCount.description: The number of stars on the repository.

pullCount.description: The total number of pulls for the repository.

anyOf.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the repository was last updated.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the repository was last modified.
The ISO 8601 timestamp when the repository was created.
The current user's affiliation with the repository, when available.

mediaTypes.description: The media types supported by the repository.

contentTypes.description: The content types supported by the repository.

categories.description: The categories assigned to the repository.

anyOf.description: The repository storage size in bytes, when available.

results.description: The items in the current page.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Docker Hub repository list.
